message:
You know that one friend who always panics at the slightest hint of trouble? Yeah, I’ve got one of those too. Just last week, she called me in a frenzy because of a thunderstorm warning. I could practically hear her pacing on the other end! We ended up chatting about her go-bag, which she hadn’t updated in ages. It was a great reminder for both of us to check our emergency plans and make sure everything was in order—because let’s face it, a little preparedness goes a long way in calming those nerves! 

Have you had a moment like that with a friend? What’s your go-to preparedness tip?
